title: zosterophyllanthos scabrilinguis
intro: Zosterophyllanthos scabrilinguis, also known as the rough-leaved zosterophyllanthos, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Zosterophyllanthos scabrilinguis include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
